testcase.name: test_trait_where_bound_runtime_parity
test_llvm_output_is_always_validated[fn inc(x Int) Int{ return x + 1; } fn main() Int{ return inc(9); }]
test_llvm_output_is_always_validated[fn main() Int{ mut x = 0; while x < 4 { x += 1; } return x; }]
test_llvm_output_is_always_validated[fn main() Int{ x = 7; if x > 3 { return 1; } return 0; }]
